description_long: This is a two-story residential house surrounded by a perimeter wall, featuring a prominent hip roof with reddish-brown tiles. The front facade includes a covered entryway with columns, a balcony above the main entrance, and a decorative fence with orange and white accents. The house has multiple windows with blue-tinted glass and awnings, as well as a side driveway leading to a covered carport. The property includes landscaped green areas and paved walkways along the sides and rear. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical layout.
description: A two-story house with a hip roof, balcony, covered entry, and perimeter wall, featuring orange, white, and blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, decorative fence, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large hip roof, perimeter wall, and a covered carport on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional entry, and the carport structure adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the balcony, multiple windows, green areas, and the driveway leading to the carport.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical accents and balcony windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with columns, steps, decorative fence, and a balcony above the main door
